title: Excalibur Remastered - 26.1.2 Update
description: Adds a new structure, "Excalibur's Shrine," where you are able to finally free Excalibur, and use it to your aid.
body: *This datapack is for Minecraft 1.21.4, 1.21.6, 1.21.7, and 1.21.8. -------------------- Excalibur: Are you worthy to draw the Sword from the Stone? Once downloaded, Excalibur Shrines will generate in your world (Tip: Type "/locate structure excalibur:shrine" to instantly locate a Sword Shrine.). At first, you will not be worthy to draw the Sword, however once you prove yourself by killing the Ender Dragon, you may pull Excalibur from it's rocky sheath. -------------------- Damage: The base attack damage is 10. Special Ability: When holding right-click, Excalibur sweeps back and forth, slashing any enemies in it's way. This attack is great for large amounts or hoards of mobs! -------------------- Frequently Asked Questions: Q: Where is the Resourcepack? A: Navigate to the [versions](https://modrinth.com/datapack/excalibur/versions) page. You will find both the resourcepack and datapack there. Q: It's not working? A: Make sure you or on Minecraft 1.21.4 or 1.21.6, depending on the version you downloaded. Also, ensure the datapack and resourcepack was installed correctly. Type "/function excalibur:load" If that command auto-fills, then the datapack was installed. Feel free to seek further help in my discord! -------------------- ***Bonus Tip!** Type "_/locate structure excalibur:shrine_" to instantly find a Sword Shrine! If your question was not answered here, you can let me know in the comments, or prefferably join my discord and ask me there! Thank your for downloading! -------------------- Looking for a Minecraft Server Host? Use my affilate link to try Shockbyte! https://shockbyte.com/billing/aff.php?aff=10878
